description: The Casamonica clan is a Sinti mafia organization based in Rome, Italy, founded in the 1970s by the Casamonica and Di Silvio families. It engages in extortion, drug trafficking, money laundering, and other criminal activities. The clan has historical alliances with the Banda della Magliana, 'Ndrangheta, and Camorra. It remains active in Lazio and surrounding areas.
